title: Update on: Disable drag & drop item move on a board
excerpt: This was a topic a year ago and just wondering where it stands today. I really need to lock down the movement of items across groups to prevent unwanted outcomes in our CRM - this conveys incorrect information in our das…

posts.author: dparibello (David Paribello)
posts.cookedHtml: This was a topic a year ago and just wondering where it stands today. I really need to lock down the movement of items across groups to prevent unwanted outcomes in our CRM - this conveys incorrect information in our dashboards and paints the wrong story to our leadership team.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey David,

I understand where you’re coming from here.

You can set this specific board permission which disables the ability to move items:

Screen Shot 2023-12-11 at 1.21.58 pm1116×638 48 KB

Is this something you could utilise? I am happy to share this comment internally with our team, incase there are plans for a stand-alone option to enable/disable drag and drop

posts.author: dparibello (David Paribello)
posts.cookedHtml: @BiancaT This doesn’t solve the issue we’re running into. The only time someone in our organization would want to manually move an item to a new group is when they’re assigned to it.
